data.title: Greeks.Live: Traders are concerned that the $90,000 resistance level may be difficult to break through, potentially triggering a bear market correction.
data.description: A briefing from the Greeks.Live Chinese community indicates that Bitcoin market sentiment is divided, with some traders worried that the $90,000 resistance level will be difficult to break, potentially signaling a bear market correction. The market faces pressure from pre-Christmas liquidity shortages, with ongoing pressure from long positions in contracts exacerbating volatility, while volatility has fallen to historic lows.

data.title: Binance Alpha Airdrop Opens at 21:00 (UTC+8) With 225-Point Eligibility Threshold
data.description: Binance announced on X that its latest Binance Alpha airdrop will go live at 13:00 (UTC) today, with users needing at least 225 Binance Alpha Points to claim. Claims will be first-come, first-served until either the airdrop pool is fully distributed or the event ends. Further details will be announced soon.

data.description:

data.title: Strategy's daily trading volume has surpassed that of JPMorgan Chase.
data.description: Bitcoin treasury firm Strategy (MSTR) now boasts a higher daily trading volume than banking giant JPMorgan Chase. (BitcoinTreasuries)

data.title: Gate launched its 48th Contract Points Airdrop, with a single account earning nearly $44.
data.description: On-chain data shows that the 48th Gate Contract Points (H) and SYRUP airdrop event is underway. The highest price for H in the past 24 hours was $0.21848, with a current market capitalization of approximately $289 million. The highest price for SYRUP in the past 24 hours was $0.35075, with a current market capitalization of approximately $373 million. This airdrop event yielded a single account a profit of nearly $44. It is understood that this airdrop is divided into two prize pools: users holding ≥ 60 Gate Contract Points can receive 20 SYRUP, consuming 10 Gate Contract Points; users holding ≥ 120 Gate Contract Points can receive 200 H, consuming 20 Gate Contract Points. The 49th Gate Contract Points airdrop, offering 100 TRX and 2000 XPIN per person, will begin on December 24th at 18:00 (UTC+8). Join now for a chance to claim rewards tomorrow.

data.title: Bitcoin Treasury Firm Strategy Surpasses JPMorgan in Daily Trading Volume
data.description: According to Odaily, Bitcoin Treasury company Strategy (MSTR) has reported a daily trading volume that now exceeds that of banking giant JPMorgan.

data.title: Binance: The Alpha airdrop can be claimed at 21:00 today. The threshold for the airdrop is 225 Alpha points.
data.description: Binance announced that the Binance Alpha airdrop will be available today at 21:00 (UTC+8). Users holding at least 225 Binance Alpha Credits are eligible to claim the tokens. It's on a first-come, first-served basis until the airdrop pool is depleted or the event ends.

data.title: Toobit Celebrates the Holidays with $1M Trading Showdown
data.description:
Toobit, the award-winning global cryptocurrency exchange, today announces the launch of the Christmas Trading Showdown, a holiday campaign with a total prize pool exceeding $1,000,000. Running from December 19, 2025, through January 12, 2026, the campaign transforms the final weeks of the year into a festive adventure by blending high-stakes competition with interactive quests. A […]
source: https://cryptopotato.com/toobit-celebrates-the-holidays-with-1m-trading-showdown/

data.title: BTC Decline Sparks Bearish Sentiment Among Traders
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Greeks.live researcher Adam shared on social media that the ongoing decline of Bitcoin (BTC) during U.S. trading hours has led to a noticeable bearish sentiment within the English-speaking community. Traders have expressed disappointment over the market's weakness. Key price levels include $86,000, which has been a critical support level tested repeatedly over the past five weeks, while $93,000 and $88,000 serve as important reference points for short-term trading strategies.

data.title: Arizona Senator Proposes Tax Exemption for Bitcoin and Cryptocurrencies
data.description: According to Odaily, Arizona State Senator Wendy Rogers has proposed an amendment to state legislation that would exempt Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies from taxation.

data.title: Hyperliquid (HYPE) Slips Toward Key Support as Selling Pressure Builds
data.description:
Hyperliquid’s HYPE token is showing signs of sustained weakness after failing to hold recent recovery highs, with price action now compressing near short-term support as volatility remains elevated. Price Action Breakdown: Where Momentum Broke The TradingView chart shows HYPE trading around $24. 00, following a steady decline from the recent local peak near $25. 4–$25
source: https://www.ethnews.com/hyperliquid-hype-slips-toward-key-support-as-selling-pressure-builds/

data.title: Arizona Senator Wendy Rogers proposes tax exemption for BTC and cryptocurrencies
data.description: Arizona Senator Wendy Rogers has proposed amending state regulations to exempt BTC and cryptocurrencies from taxes. (Bitcoin Magazine)
